note: Created WgMeshTopology test helper in tests/WgSocket.Tests/WgMeshTopology.cs. Features: CreateFullMesh(count) for N-way peering, CreateStar(count) for hub-and-spoke, CreateFromAdjacency() for custom topologies. Each device gets unique tunnel IP (10.0.0.X) and localhost UDP port. Implements IAsyncDisposable, provides WaitForAllHandshakesAsync() with diagnostic timeout messages. Build verified.
